title: Logical Craft
body:
# About this mod

## General

- books will drop paper when interact with  water

- lava bucket when turned into obsidian when interact with water

- fire charge will get destroy when interact with water

- torches will drop paper when interact with water

- paper & maps will get destroy when interact with water

- diamond now immune to lava, just like in real life

- campfire will kill items above it

- tnt now have realistic particles

- torches can be used as a weapon(burn)

- candles and torches will burns mob above it

- now you can't place powder snow,water cauldron,powder snow cauldron
  in the nether

- fireworks will broken under water

- feather is now floating above water

- villagers will drop emerald when they die or get hit by a mob

- iron golem buff

- enderman has 10% chance to drop eye of ender

- skeleton,wither skeleton,stray now have 90% chance to drop skull

- enderman can't stand inside cauldron that filled with water

## BONUS

- villages spawn rate now increase

- ores drop increase to

- custom crafting
